result.text:
Meanwhile at LA Vape Cabal HQ

Rasmr: my Fartcoin video did really well

Frank: maybe we need a 3rd art change or is it a 4th

TG: moms is gonna kill me

Banks: Adin is gonna kill me

OG: why. did he buy a utopia nft?

Banks: mlg you cuck. Why are you even here. Who are you. 

Rasmr: Everyone thinks I’m gay cuz I tweeted that I have sex with men

Banks: what’s your body count for men. 5 or less and I can still be early. 

Rasmr: you’re late lol. 

TG: first the frosted hair. She was so pissed about that. Now this. You could have told me you were gay before you recommended the frosted hair bro. 

Rasmr: it looks good 😏

Frank: how many art changes have I done

OG: what if you switch from telegram for degods to Signal

Frank: that might work. 

TG: Frank when are your lawyers going to let me tweet again. 

Frank: around when AGI is birthed on Solana bro

OG: hahaha so never lol 

Banks: who are you fr 

TG: my mom is gonna kill me

Banks: I banged a hot chick last night

Frank: do you think the community will be hyped if I close the telegram and open a signal group 

TG: how did I not see how retarded you were 2 years ago. 

Rasmr: guys I’m not gay. 

OG: you guys heard East Germany is launching a coin tonight?

Banks: you got eca? Whoever you are. 

TG: my mom is gonna kill me. East Germany isn’t even a country anymore man. 

Frank: that doesn’t matter. I’ll full port and then tweet about how it’s likely Germany is splitting up again. 

Banks: rasmr is it 10 or less. That’s still kinda early. 

Rasmr: you’re still late bro lol. 

Gigi: I’ll live stream during the East Germany launch. 

SolJakey: I’ll make sure she buys the right one this time guys. 

TG: when tf did you 2 get here. I hate LA.
